findings.evidence: `rg` shows `MulAction.orbit`, `MulAction.mem_orbit_iff`, `MulAction.orbitRel`, and `MulAction.orbitRel_apply` in `mathlib/Mathlib/GroupTheory/GroupAction/Defs.lean`, while `Setoid.lift_injective_iff_ker_eq_of_le` and `Setoid.quotientKerEquivOfSurjective` are in `mathlib/Mathlib/Data/Setoid/Basic.lean`; `GroupAction/Basic.lean` merely publicly imports both and adds unrelated orbit properties.
findings.fix: Replace the added import with direct imports such as `Mathlib.GroupTheory.GroupAction.Defs` and `Mathlib.Data.Setoid.Basic`, keeping only imports whose declarations are actually used.
findings.issue: `Deck.lean` imports `Mathlib.GroupTheory.GroupAction.Basic`, but the added code uses orbit-relation definitions from `GroupAction/Defs` and arbitrary quotient/setoid API from `Data/Setoid/Basic`, not declarations defined in `GroupAction/Basic`.

summary: The new declarations belong naturally in the `Deck p` file, but the new import still relies on a broader/transitive Mathlib module instead of directly importing the files that define the orbit and quotient APIs used here.
